metadata.description: Official Nimble plugin: web data toolkit and business workflow skills

plugins.name: nimble
plugins.description: Real-time web scraping and data extraction for AI agents - powered by Nimble. Search, extract, map, and crawl any site on the web with built-in unblocking and stealth capabilities. Get structured data from pre-built web search agents, or build your own reusable extraction workflows. The definitive web data toolkit for AI-native development.
